creator: andreas@marvin.RoBIN.de
text:
I have uploaded this port to ftp.freebsd.org a few days ago and
made some minors changes afterwards. I wanted to ftp the modified
port, but this time my link to ftp.freebsd.org was horribly slow
so I hope it is ok if I include the stuff uuencoded.
